title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
